title: U.S. Census American Community Survey

supported_inputs.survey: ACS survey such as acs5 or acs1
supported_inputs.geography: Geographic summary level such as tract or block group
supported_inputs.variables: ACS variable ids or table ids

verification_hints: Variable ids, geography predicates, and year availability must be validated downstream.
Census API dataset URLs are source-prior leads, not final evidence.
Boundary files and attributes must remain separate unless the consuming route explicitly needs both.
Do not use this card as benchmark-case answer data.
access_notes: Census Data API datasets are public; an API key can improve quota handling but is not required for basic bounded requests.
Legacy ACS known_source entries remain source-prior compatibility hints.
ACS attributes and TIGER boundaries are separate verification concerns.
future_verification_hints: Confirm variables, survey, vintage, predicates, geography level, and boundary joins.
Route-agent consumers must run resolver/probe/download/verifier separately.
migration_note: Legacy ACS known-source entries should migrate to SourceCard metadata and scripts that expose variable/geography/year ambiguity.
